Hey Avi,

Here’s the guide I mentioned

34 AI Projects That Can Run Your Entire Business

Inside you’ll see how coaches and consultants are structuring Claude Projects to handle the key roles across their business —
content, sales, client delivery, operations and more

Most people are still using AI like a chatbot
The real shift happens when you start structuring it like a team that understands your brand, your offers and how your business
runs

That’s exactly what this guide walks through

Download it [here [https://assets.cdn.filesafe.space/4pEp1NDve1Vg3Hx08Mmb/media/69c15d4f3e56b9593e8eb0fd.pdf]]

Ben Hawksworth

The Coach Consultant
